subcodes.first_line: O ye two beloved friends! Know ye not in what ocean 'Abdu'l-Bahá is immersed? I swear by the Most Great Name, my spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار عزیز هیچ میدانید که عبدالبهاء غرق چه دریاایست قسم باسم اعظم روحی
subcodes.subjects: @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @law of pilgrimage, @personal instructions, @Shrines and Holy places
